install_app_message: Add it to your home screen for quicker access.
active_game_locked_message: This puzzle is paused here because another tab is playing a different puzzle.
arrow_keys: Arrow keys: Move around the board
number_keys: Number keys: Write a note or set the sudoku number
show_circle_menu: Show circle menu when a cell is clicked (desktop only)
show_occurrences: Show occurrences of numbers in number buttons
about_text: This sudoku app is and will be free of charge, free of ads and free of tracking. Its source code is available at
report_issue: If you find a bug or experience any issues, please report it on
collection_finished: Congratulations! You arrived at the end of collection "{{collection}}". Select a new sudoku to play.
no_sudokus_in_collection: There are no sudokus in this collection.
confirm_new_game: You are currently playing sudoku {{currentCollectionName}} #{{currentIndex}}, do you want to pause it and start {{newCollectionName}} #{{newIndex}}?
select_game_subtitle: Select a new sudoku to play or continue with an already started game.
confirm_clear: Are you sure you want to restart this game? Your progress will be lost.
confirm_restart_finished: Are you sure? This will restart the sudoku and reset the timer. It will continue to say that you solved it.
invalid_sudoku_url: The Sudoku in the URL is invalid.
multiplayer_join_description: Enter a room code to join a shared puzzle.
multiplayer_online_required: An internet connection is required to create or join an online room. Solo play remains available offline.
multiplayer_invalid_room_code: Enter a valid six-character room code.
multiplayer_room_invalid_or_expired: That room code is invalid or the room has expired.
multiplayer_room_full: That room already has two guests.
multiplayer_puzzle_version_mismatch: Refresh the app before creating this room.
multiplayer_service_unavailable: Online play is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
multiplayer_version_mismatch: Refresh the app before rejoining this room.
